creator: emaste@freebsd.org
text:
> I'm not clear whether this should be reported to Apple or FreeBSD

Thank you for your interest and submitting a concise bug report with reproduction steps. We have done a lot of work to improve BSD Grep in FreeBSD prior to making it the default, and this issue is not reproducible thus reporting this to Apple would be appropriate. However, comment #2 claims that it is already fixed in a more recent macOS version so I suspect there is no value in submitting such a report.
